entry.title: Journal retracts breast cancer paper 10 years after sleuth flagged issues
entry.summary: A biomedical journal has retracted a paper by a cancer researcher who sued her former institution over misconduct allegations. The action comes a decade after a sleuth first raised concerns about t…

entry.title: Exclusive: Medical student in Nepal behind busy research factory
entry.summary: A second-year medical student in Nepal is at the center of an international research network churning out everything from systematic reviews and meta-analyses to case reports and database studies, …

entry.title: Publisher investigating peer reviewer for alleged bribery scheme
entry.summary: Deagreez/iStock Earlier this year, Tushar Sen, an independent researcher based in New Delhi, submitted a manuscript to Security and Privacy about the modeling of polymorphic malware. On May 15, a p…

entry.title: Weekend reads: Private info in ‘most’ arXiv preprints; why did George Church decline authorship; 28 misconduct cases in China
entry.summary: If your week flew by — we know ours did — catch up here with what you might have missed. The week at Retraction Watch featured: ‘Disappointed’: Cochrane journal asked researchers to publish article…

entry.title: Harvard cancer researchers earn retraction for image duplication
entry.summary: A group of researchers at Brigham and Women’s Hospital and Harvard Medical School in Boston have lost a paper for image duplication following an investigation by the two institutions. The pap…

entry.title: Now, 240: More than a decade later, journals are still retracting Joachim Boldt’s papers
entry.summary: Martin Tramèr was editor-in-chief of the European Journal of Anaesthesiology during what he once called in print “The Boldt debacle.” The misconduct scandal involving hundreds of papers by Joachim …

entry.title: Sage retracts eight papers by former Radboud ‘rising star’ for compromised peer-review process
entry.summary: The publisher Sage has retracted eight papers by a former “rising star” from a Dutch university for a “compromised” peer-review process at a journal he edited. Last week, Re…

entry.title: ORI sanction and news coverage prompts sleuthing, retraction
entry.summary: Four months after the Office of Research Integrity sanctioned a former postdoc for falsifying images in grant reports, a Science journal is retracting a paper by the researcher for image duplicatio…

entry.title: A student claimed to have a Ph.D. in at least eight letters to journals. Two have been retracted.
entry.summary: This past year, Zhihao Lei has signed his name to at least 35 letters to the editor of medical journals, weighing in on topics from ICU care to breast cancer. In eight of them, he identified himsel…

entry.title: ‘Disappointed’: Cochrane journal asked researchers to publish article, then retracted it for conflicts
entry.summary: A developer of an AI tool for conducting literature reviews said he and his team were “excited and honored” when a Cochrane journal had extended a “specific and individual invitation” in January 20…
